name: Cat Kids' Mini Weighted Plush Throw Pillow Blue - Pillowfort™
description: Add a cute touch to your kid's bedroom with the Cat Mini Weighted Plush Throw Pillow from Pillowfort™. This plush throw pillow is designed in the shape of a cat wearing a hat that comes complete with face detailing for a cute look. Featuring a polyester-spandex knit exterior and filling, this weighted novelty plush pillow is sure to create a comfy, friendly setting.
